loop1.title: Energy Input & Distribution
loop1.note: Showing total active power and energy for all panel members; per-member breakdown is populated from member meters (UPS-01/02/03, BPDB-01, BPDB-02, UPS-04), while Solar Incomers and Transformers are dark (no data).

loop1.title: Energy Flow Diagram
loop1.note: Showing energy flow for active feeders (UPS-01/02/03, BPDB-01/02, UPS-04/05/06); supply incomers (Solar-1/2, Transformer-01/02) are dark (no data) and render as zero-value nodes.
